hooks.hook_text: POV: you just found out this Harry Potter exhibition has ACTUAL movie props and you've been scrolling TikTok instead of booking tickets
hooks.visual_opener: Close-up of someone's shocked face looking at phone

hooks.hook_text: POV: you're 27 and crying in the Hogwarts Great Hall because your inner 11-year-old finally got their letter
hooks.visual_opener: Adult tearing up while looking up at floating candles

hooks.hook_text: POV: you walked into Diagon Alley and realized you've been living in the muggle world way too long
They said this Harry Potter exhibition was 'just okay'... wait for it
Walking through this Harry Potter exhibition like a normal person... wait for the Forbidden Forest section
My friend who 'doesn't get the Harry Potter hype' came with me... wait for their reaction to the moving portraits
Their face when they realized that's the ACTUAL sorting hat from the movies
hooks.visual_opener: Moment of recognition dawning on someone's face

hooks.hook_text: Her reaction to finding out she could try on authentic Hogwarts robes (she's 34)
hooks.visual_opener: Adult woman's pure joy putting on robes

hooks.hook_text: Dad's face when he saw the Knight Bus and remembered why he loved these movies
Can you walk through the Potions classroom without pretending to be Snape?
hooks.visual_opener: Challenge text over Potions classroom setup

hooks.hook_text: Try not to ugly cry when you see Dobby's actual costume (impossible challenge)
hooks.visual_opener: Warning text over emotional scene setup

hooks.hook_text: Can you spot all 7 Horcruxes hidden throughout the exhibition? Most people miss 3
This Harry Potter exhibition closes in 3 weeks and you're really gonna let your childhood dreams expire?
Everyone's posting from this Harry Potter exhibition and you're still waiting for the 'right time' to go
Your Hogwarts letter finally arrived... in the form of tickets to this exhibition that closes next month
